since_last: 40% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.04%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC +1.92% · Gold -0.45% · Nasdaq100 -0.37%. 40% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.04%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.04%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +17.78%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +17.78%, VRT +6.21%, PWR +4.86%, MU +4.81%, INTC +4.76%. Laggards: SPCX -10.77%, AVAV -10.12%, ARM -8.14%, PLTR -6.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.77% at $165.07
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
